description: This file defines a Bootstrap modal component, including its class implementation, event handling, and integration with jQuery. It manages modal display, hiding, focus trapping, backdrop handling, and related UI behaviors.

classes.name: Modal
classes.description: A class representing the Bootstrap modal component, handling show/hide logic, event management, focus trapping, backdrop control, and jQuery integration.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Displays the modal, handling transition and focus.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the modal, handling transition and focus release.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Cleans up event handlers and disposes of modal resources.

methods.name: handleUpdate
methods.description: Adjusts the modal layout on update.

methods.name: _initializeBackDrop
methods.description: Creates and initializes the backdrop component.

methods.name: _initializeFocusTrap
methods.description: Creates and initializes the focus trap component.

methods.name: _showElement
methods.description: Handles the DOM manipulations to display the modal element.

methods.name: _addEventListeners
methods.description: Sets up event listeners for modal interactions.

methods.name: _hideModal
methods.description: Handles the DOM manipulations to hide the modal element.

methods.name: _isAnimated
methods.description: Checks if the modal has animation classes.

methods.name: _triggerBackdropTransition
methods.description: Handles backdrop transition effects when modal is static or overflowing.

methods.name: _adjustDialog
methods.description: Adjusts dialog padding based on scrollbar presence.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: Enables jQuery plugin interface for modal.
